original_image_tags: A low-quality, upside-down scan of a single typed government document page on aged, yellowed paper with two hole-punches at the top. The page contains a memo with several official stamps and handwritten annotations.
Several official stamps are visible on the lower half of the document, some upside down relative to the main text.
